content_body: We went tubing ~ it was a lot of fun. Sunday we relaxed, went to the market, and picked strawberries. Monday we went gold mining - it was a beautiful ride to get there. We cooked pasta, homemade sauce, we BBQed hamburgers, hot dogs and chicken. Made fires every night, and the kids walked down to the river. We spent the entire time as a family and enjoyed every minute of it. Every night mom and I cooked and the kids cleaned up, actually every meal. Thank you for an amazing vacation! It is a family trip we will never forget! We will be back!
title: Unforgettable Family Vacation to the North Georgia Mountains
